case_for: Stafford's projection is strong (24.8 pts) and he just posted a 24.8-point performance in week 8, suggesting recent positive momentum and a favorable matchup outlook.
case_against: His floor has been alarmingly volatile with three separate sub-7 point outings (wk2, wk4, wk7) in his last six games, showing real bust risk against the 12.0 threshold.
